ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "driver_type" TEXT /* Type of driver (e.g., individual, company-owned) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Vehicle number of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active status of the driver */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the driver's profile picture */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips completed by the driver */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the driver */,
  "payment_account" TEXT /* Payment account details for the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver being rated */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the rider (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the rider */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_ratings_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_ratings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "riders" (
  "rider_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each rider */,
  "rider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the rider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the rider */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the rider joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active status of the rider */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the rider's profile picture */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the rider */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken by the rider */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the rider */,
  "payment_account" TEXT /* Payment account details for the rider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver who took the trip */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider who took the trip */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trip was taken */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the rider (1-5) */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time the rider was picked up */,
  "dropoff_time" TEXT /* Time the rider was dropped off */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in kilometers */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., ongoing, completed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location of the trip */,
  "dropoff_location" TEXT /* Dropoff location of the trip */,
  "pickup_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the dropoff location */,
  "dropoff_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the dropoff location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_locations_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver who owns the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_number" TEXT /* Vehicle number */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "insurance_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the insurance */,
  "registration_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider who made the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Last 4 digits of the card number */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "card_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the card */,
  "default_payment" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider who received the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, free ride) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the promotion is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., license, insurance) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_documents_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_vehicle_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., registration, permit) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_vehicle_documents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rider_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "rider_id" TEXT /* ID of the rider who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, proof of address) */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rider_documents_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who raised the ticket */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., payment, ride) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was raised */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the support staff assigned to the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who replied */,
  "reply" TEXT /* Reply text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reply */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reply resolved the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the support staff assigned to the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_replies_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_replies_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES support_tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active status of the admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
